comment: Tobruk Scenario One ('The Clash of Armor', rulebook pp.4-5) direct-fire data, transcribed from the charts the VASSAL module itself ships (extracted/images/*). Every table cites its source image. Damage-code grammar per rulebook p.5.b: clauses separated by '|', each 'DMG<=R' applies only at range<=R; first matching clause by range wins; no match = hit with no effect. DMG tokens: K kill, M mobility-kill, F firepower-kill, Cn crew casualties (IGNORED in Scenario 1 per p.5.e), (Pn) = roll one die, <=n means K-kill. '-' = ricochet.

hpn_modifiers.comment: p.4 I.F.1.b.2 (+1 if target moved this turn). Other modifiers on Hit_Modifier_Chart.png reference scenarios 5-7 (weapon pit, flank -1 [VII.B.2], burst-on-target, bunker) - OUT OF SCOPE for Scenario 1 and deliberately not applied.

fire_initiation.comment: p.5 H: an AFV may not INITIATE fire when the unadjusted HPN exceeds 8 unless (a) the target has fired at it, or (b) the target is an AFV presenting flank/rear aspect; once it has fired at a target it may keep firing at it regardless.

37mmM6.label: 37mm M6 (Stuart)
37mmM6.source: UK_To_Hit_Table.png row 'Stuart' (index 0 = range 1; beyond list = no fire possible)

stuart.label: U.S. M3 (Lt.) 'General Stuart'
